p1_summary.source: freshly computed from real P1_Global model artefacts

champion.subject: S3
champion.selection_criterion: highest subject-paradigm mean accuracy among top-10 peak-accuracy finalists with class coverage >= 8/19

shap_xai.note: permutation_importance (accuracy-drop); not numerically comparable to P2 SHAP

T0_pillar1_raw_fresh.csv.description: P1 Global EEGNet accuracy (freshly computed from real model artefacts)

T0_pillar2_raw_fresh.csv.description: P2 Subject-Dependent EEGNet accuracy (E3 freshly computed; other exps from prior run)

T0_pillar3_raw_fresh.csv.description: P3 Subject-Dependent SVM accuracy from prior computed run

T1_p1_descriptive_stats.csv.description: P1 Global EEGNet descriptive statistics and one-sample t-test against chance

T2_cross_pillar_summary.csv.description: Cross-pillar accuracy summary: mean, median, max, std, gain over chance

T3_wilcoxon_p2_vs_p3.csv.description: Wilcoxon Signed-Rank test: P2 vs P3 (best per subject), Holm-Bonferroni corrected

T3_per_subject_p2_vs_p3.csv.description: Per-subject best accuracy comparison: P2 vs P3

T4_subject_rescue.csv.description: Subject rescue analysis: subjects where P3 outperforms P2

T5_champion_top3_candidates.csv.description: Top 3 champion candidates ranked by subject-paradigm mean (CV tie-break) after class-coverage gate

T5_champion_candidate_coverage.csv.description: Top-10 finalists with class coverage (classes with recall>0 of 19) used for the champion gate

T5_champion_grand_matrix.csv.description: Grand summary matrix for the objectively selected champion model (P3/E5/S3/barlow)

T5_per_class_recall.csv.description: Per-class precision, recall, F1-score for champion model (correct 19-class syllable labels)

T6_permutation_importance.csv.description: Permutation importance (n_repeats=30) of handcrafted features for P3 champion (P3/E5/S3/barlow)

T7_friedman_avg_ranks.csv.description: Average ranks from Friedman test on P2 (k=8 configurations, n=12 subjects)

T8_p3_feature_ablation.csv.description: P3 feature group ablation statistics across all experiments and subjects

T9_inference_latency.csv.description: Inference latency (mean, 95th percentile) for P2 EEGNet and P3 SVM

T10_p2_subject_experiment_matrix.csv.description: P2 EEGNet: best test accuracy (%) per subject × ablation configuration (12x8 matrix)

T10_p2_best_config_per_subject.csv.description: Best performing ablation configuration per subject for P2 EEGNet

T14_p1_per_syllable_recall.csv.description: P1 Global EEGNet per-syllable classification metrics (best config: E6 Imagined Only)

T15_p2_per_syllable_recall_aggregated.cs.description: P2 (P2/E3): per-syllable mean recall and std across 12 subjects

T17_p3_per_subject_stats.csv.description: P3 SVM per-subject accuracy statistics (mean, std, peak, floor, CV across all feature groups & experiments)

T17_p3_subject_feature_heatmap.csv.description: P3 SVM best accuracy (%) per subject × feature group — 12x5 matrix

T18_p3_per_syllable_recall.csv.description: P3 SVM per-syllable mean recall and std across 12 subjects (best config per subject)

T18b_p3_subject_syllable_heatmap.csv.description: P3 SVM per-subject × per-syllable recall (%) — 12×19 matrix

T19_spearman_p2_p3.csv.description: Spearman rank correlation between P2 and P3 best-per-subject accuracy

T20_p3_friedman_avg_ranks.csv.description: Average ranks from Friedman test on P3 SVM (k=8 configurations, n=12 subjects)

T11_p1_global_confusion_matrix.csv.description: P1 Global EEGNet normalized confusion matrix for best config (E6 Imagined Only)

T12_bootstrap_ci.csv.description: Bootstrap confidence intervals (95%, n=2000 resamples) per paradigm

T13_cohens_d_effect_size.csv.description: Cohen's d pairwise effect size across the three paradigm comparisons
